title: Redeploy Version 1 as final production build

requirements.text: Rebuild and redeploy the application in its current Version 1 state — all frontend source files, backend Motoko logic, styles, configuration files, and assets — exactly as they stand, with no modifications. This is a clean production push of the existing Version 1 codebase.
acceptanceCriteria: The deployed application matches the Version 1 codebase without any new changes introduced.
All existing features (luxury theme, home carousel, product catalog, product detail, cart, wishlist, checkout, auth, order history/tracking, admin panel, search) are functional in production.
The frontend compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit passing.
The backend Motoko actor deploys without errors.
Custom brand imagery in frontend/public/assets/generated renders correctly on the home page and category pages.

constraints: Do not introduce any new features, UI changes, or backend logic changes.
Do not modify any files — this is a redeploy of the existing Version 1 state.
Immutable paths (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui) must not be touched.
nonGoals: No bug fixes beyond what exists in Version 1.
No new images or asset generation.
